ch0112_91_hibiki/0101_0701_01_10:
Nice to see you again today,
[Name:PlayerNickname ]!
ch0112_91_hibiki/0101_0701_02_10:
If you’re heading out to battle, you’d better
tell me, too!
ch0112_91_hibiki/7101_0701_01_10:
To me, I guess being a Neo Champion feels
like I’ve climbed all the way to the top of a
mountain.
ch0112_91_hibiki/7101_0701_02_10:
Maybe I’m the only one who feels that way.
I could be just halfway up—or even a third!
ch0112_91_hibiki/7101_0701_03_10:
If there’s more to go, then all I gotta do is
keep climbing! I get hyped just thinking
about all the sights I’ve yet to see!
ch0112_91_hibiki/7102_0701_01_10:
My Raikou would never lose a battle of
speed!
ch0112_91_hibiki/7102_0701_02_10:
I wanna try gathering some Pokémon known
for their speed and watch them race!
ch0112_91_hibiki/7103_0701_01_10:
I’ve thought about what I want to tell
everyone now that I’m a Neo Champion.
ch0112_91_hibiki/7103_0701_02_10:
I think the number-one thing I wanna say
is...the adventure never ends!
ch0112_91_hibiki/7103_0701_03_10:
I’ll show everyone that no matter what titles
I earn, I’ll never stop challenging myself!
ch0112_91_hibiki/7104_0701_01_10:
When I see all my friends and rivals getting
stronger here on Pasio...
ch0112_91_hibiki/7104_0701_02_10:
it motivates me to get stronger and battle
them, too! The excitement never ends!
ch0112_91_hibiki/7104_0701_03_10:
That’s why I think the strength of those
around you can stimulate your own growth.
ch0112_91_hibiki/7105_0701_01_10:
You’re my friend AND my rival,
[Name:PlayerNickname ]!
ch0112_91_hibiki/7105_0701_02_10: If you need anything, I’m here for you!
ch0112_91_hibiki/7105_0701_03_10:
Like if, for example...you wanted an all-out
battle!
ch0112_91_hibiki/7105_0701_04_10:
If so, I’ll take you on as a Neo Champion—
with everything I’ve got!
ch0112_91_hibiki/1701_0701_01_10:
I figured I’d run into you here! Take this—it’s
for you!
ch0112_91_hibiki/1701_0702_01_10: I hope it helps as you explore Pasio!
ch0112_91_hibiki/2501_0701_01_10: Lyra, Kris, and I came here from Johto...
ch0112_91_hibiki/2501_0701_02_10:
and we all formed sync pairs with the three
Legendary Pokémon from the Burned Tower!
ch0112_91_hibiki/2501_0701_03_10: It’s like a dream come true! I’m super stoked!
ch0112_91_hibiki/2501_0702_01_10:
It’s cool we get along so well, but I’m also
aiming to be number one!
ch0112_91_hibiki/2501_0702_02_10:
When it comes to speed, Raikou’s got those
other two beat!
ch0112_91_hibiki/2511_0701_01_10:
Even after becoming a Neo Champion,
I haven’t changed how I think as a Trainer.
ch0112_91_hibiki/2511_0701_02_10:
I can still spend time with my Pokémon and
have fun battling.
ch0112_91_hibiki/2511_0701_03_10: That’s what I’m finding makes me happiest!
ch0112_91_hibiki/2511_0702_01_10:
In the future, no matter my power or glory,
my feelings won’t waver!
ch0112_91_hibiki/2511_0702_02_10:
After all, my number-one dream has already
come true—
ch0112_91_hibiki/3001_0701_01_10:
Start your morning with a hearty hello!
It’ll get you going!
ch0112_91_hibiki/3003_0701_01_10:
If you see dark clouds in the distance, watch
out for lightning—even on sunny days!
ch0112_91_hibiki/3005_0701_01_10:
I’m gonna head to bed early tonight so I can
run all over the place tomorrow!
